scripts.build:github-root: tsc --noEmit && vite build --outDir ../.root-build --emptyOutDir && rm -rf ../assets ../js && cp -R ../.root-build/index.html ../index.html && cp -R ../.root-build/assets ../assets && cp -R ../.root-build/js ../js && cp -R ../.root-build/favicon.svg ../favicon.svg && rm -rf ../.root-build
